name: Bette's Coconut Delight Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F (175°C). Bake the cake in a 9 x 13-inch pan.
2. In a saucepan, heat the crushed pineapple and its juice with 1 cup of sugar until the sugar is dissolved.
3. Once the cake is baked and cooled, poke holes all over it using a fork.
4. Slowly pour the cream of coconut over the cake, spreading it evenly.
5. Sprinkle the shredded coconut over the top of the cake.
6. Pour the pineapple mixture over the top.
7. Cover with cool whip and sprinkle additional shredded coconut on top.
8. Refrigerate for several hours before serving.
